title: Luxottica defends antitrust class actions in British Columbia and Quebec
content:
## Luxottica defends antitrust class actions in British Columbia and Quebec
McCarthy Tétrault is advising Luxottica, a leading manufacturer and retailer of eyewear, on its Canadian distribution and retail policies, and in defending parallel Quebec and British Columbia class action litigations relating to the retail of eyewear in Canada.
McCarthy Tétrault is advising Luxottica with a team led by Casey Halladay that includes Kate McNeece (Competition), Kristian Brabander, Alexandra Cocks and Daphne Anastassiadis (Litigation).
